name: Universal Islands of Adventure
description: Universal Islands of Adventure, often shortened to Islands of Adventure, is a theme park located in Orlando, Florida, United States.  It originally opened as Universal Studios Islands of Adventure on May 28, 1999, along with Universal CityWalk, as part of a major expansion that transformed Universal Studios Florida into Universal Orlando Resort.  The investment was Universal's largest since the resort's founding in 1990.
imageAttribution: Pharos Lighthouse featuring the park's original logo
